rationale: The page contains two appendices: Appendix 6 lists key achievements of the National Educational Policy 2020 with specific data points on school and higher education, rural school metrics, teacher training, and literacy. Appendix 7 provides a table of major international and national reports and their releasing organizations.
cleanedText:
9.6. APPENDIX 6: KEY ACHIEVEMENTS OF NATIONAL EDUCATIONAL POLICY 2020
Particulars | Details
School education (Economic Survey 2024-25):
- Near universal GER at primary level: 93 %
- Decline in School dropout rates: 1.9 % for primary, 5.2 % for upper primary, and 14.1 % for secondary levels.
- Digitalization: Increase in schools equipped with computers (38.5% to 57.2%) and internet facilities (22.3% to 53.9%) from 2023-2024 to 2019-20.
Higher Education (18–23 age group) (Economic Survey 2024-25):
- Increase in GER: From 23.7% (2014-15) to 28.4% (2021-22)
- Increase in Total Higher Education Institutions (HEIs): 13.8% from 2014- 15 to 2022-23.
Rural schools (Annual Status of Education Report (ASER) 2024):
- FLN Directives: Over 80% of 15,728 rural schools reported receiving FLN directives.
- Overall school enrolment rates among 6-14 age group: > 95% for close to 20 years.
- Drop in Proportion of 15-16-year-old children not enrolled in school: From 13.1% in 2018 to 7.9% in 2024.
Teacher Training:
- 12.97 lakh teachers trained under NISHTHA (Teacher Training Programme).
Inclusivity:
- 7.58 lakh girls enrolled in inclusive residential schools.
Internationalisation:
- Prestigious institutions like Deakin and Wollongong Universities (Australia) and University of Southampton (UK) have campuses in India
Literacy:
- Ladakh became the first fully literate administrative unit followed by Mizoram, Goa and Tripura
Multilingualism:
- National Tests like CUET, JEE (Mains), and NEET (UG) are conducted in 12 Indian languages
9.7. APPENDIX 7: KEY REPORTS IN NEWS
Reports | Released by
- International Migration Outlook 2025 | Organization for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD)
- World Urbanisation Prospects 2025 Report | United Nations Department of Economic and Social Affairs (UN DESA).
- Child Nutrition Report 2025 | UNICEF (United Nations Children's Fund)
- Unified District Information System for Education Plus (UDISE+) 2024-25 Report | Ministry of Education
- Global Education Monitoring Report 2024 | United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization (UNESCO)
- State of World Population 2025 Report | United Nations Population Fund (UNFPA)
- Global Hunger Index, 2025 | Concern Worldwide and Welthungerhilfe, NGOs from Ireland and Germany respectively
- Global Gender Gap, 2025 | World Economic Forum (WEF)
- Global Tobacco Epidemic, 2025 | World Health Organisation (WHO)
- Human Development Report 2025 | United Nations Development Programme (UNDP)
- Prison Statistics India (PSI) Report 2023, Annual Crime in India Report 2023, Accidental Deaths & Suicides in India Report 2023 | National Crime Records Bureau (NCRB)
